clue/features/pkgmanager/resolver

  • Index

    • Dependency
    • PackageNotFoundError
    • PackageRegistry
    • ResolvedPackage
    • ResolverError
    • UnresolvedPackage
    • VersionConflictError
    • VersionConstraint

  • Procs
        $
      • `$`(c: VersionConstraint): string
      • `$`(rp: ResolvedPackage): string
        addPackage
      • addPackage(registry: var PackageRegistry; name: string; version: Version; dependencies: seq[Dependency])
      • addPackage(registry: var PackageRegistry; pkg: UnresolvedPackage)
        parseConstraint
      • parseConstraint(s: string): VersionConstraint
        resolve
      • resolve(registry: PackageRegistry; roots: seq[Dependency]): seq[ResolvedPackage]
        satisfies
      • satisfies(v: Version; c: VersionConstraint): bool

This module implements a simple package resolver using DFS (Depth-First Search) with cycle detection and version conflict handling.

Types

CircularDependencyError = object of ResolverError
Dependency = object
  name*: string
  constraint*: VersionConstraint
PackageNotFoundError = object of ResolverError
PackageRegistry = Table[string, seq[UnresolvedPackage]]
ResolvedPackage = object
  name*: string
  version*: Version
ResolverError = object of CatchableError
UnresolvedPackage = object
  name*: string
  version*: Version
  dependencies*: seq[Dependency]
VersionConflictError = object of ResolverError
VersionConstraint = object
  kind*: VersionConstraintKind
  version*: Version
VersionConstraintKind = enum
  vcExact,                  ## =1.2.3
  vcGte,                    ## >=1.2.3
  vcGt,                     ## >1.2.3
  vcLte,                    ## <=1.2.3
  vcLt,                     ## <1.2.3
  vcTilde,                  ## ~1.2.3  (>=1.2.3 <1.3.0)
  vcCaret,                  ## ^1.2.3  (>=1.2.3 <2.0.0)
  vcAny                      ## *

Procs

func `$`(c: VersionConstraint): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
func `$`(rp: ResolvedPackage): string {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
func addPackage(registry: var PackageRegistry; name: string; version: Version;
                dependencies: seq[Dependency]) {....raises: [KeyError, ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
func addPackage(registry: var PackageRegistry; pkg: UnresolvedPackage) {.
    ...raises: [KeyError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Register a package version into the registry. 
func parseConstraint(s: string): VersionConstraint {.
    ...raises: [InvalidVersionError, ParseError, ValueError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Parse a version constraint string into a VersionConstraint.
Supports: *, =, >=, >, <=, <, ~, ^
proc resolve(registry: PackageRegistry; roots: seq[Dependency]): seq[
    ResolvedPackage] {....raises: [CircularDependencyError, KeyError, ValueError,
                                InvalidVersionError, VersionConflictError,
                                PackageNotFoundError], tags: [], forbids: [].}

Resolve a list of root dependencies against the registry. Returns the full flat list of resolved packages.

Raises: CircularDependencyError – when a cycle is detected VersionConflictError – when two requirements conflict PackageNotFoundError – when no matching version exists

func satisfies(v: Version; c: VersionConstraint): bool {.
    ...raises: [ValueError, InvalidVersionError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check whether version v satisfies constraint c.
